channel.title: Sullivan County, Tennessee — County News
channel.description: Official news and announcements from Sullivan County, Tennessee government.

item.title: Sullivan County Employee Food Drive
item.description: Sullivan County employees organize a food drive to support the local community during the holiday season.
item.dc:creator: Nick Johnson

item.title: Blountville Little League Volunteers Needed
item.description: Blountville Little League is seeking volunteers for the upcoming season.
item.dc:creator: Nick Johnson

item.title: Affidavit Sullivan Co Public Notice
item.description: Public notice affidavit issued by Sullivan County for official county business.
item.dc:creator: Nick Johnson

item.title: Hotel/Motel Tax Law Update
item.description: New law regarding hotel/motel tax effective July 1, 2025.
item.dc:creator: Nick Johnson

item.title: Building Inspector & Code Enforcement Job Opening
item.description: Sullivan County is hiring a Building Inspector and Code Enforcement Officer.
item.dc:creator: Nick Johnson

item.title: Household Hazardous Waste Collection Event
item.description: Free household hazardous waste collection event for Sullivan County residents.
item.dc:creator: Sullivan County

item.title: GIS Interactive Zoning Map Now Available
item.description: Sullivan County's interactive GIS zoning map is now available online.
item.dc:creator: Sullivan County
